title: Only Elytra Hitbox
description: A mod that only renders the player hitbox when they are gliding with elytra.
body:
# Only Elytra Hitbox
A mod that only renders the player hitbox when they are gliding with elytra. Especially useful for PVP. Created to allow players to hit the unintuitive elytra hitbox, while disabling hitboxes otherwise for a cleaner look.

The mod also disables the red and blue viewlines of players to make the hitbox easier to see.

## Notes

This mod overrides vanilla hitboxes.
You cannot have another hitbox mod enabled while using this mod.
